---
title: ""
pagetitle: "BioMIND — BioAI, Molecular Intelligence, Networks, and Discovery"
description: "BioMIND is a UCF interdisciplinary research cluster advancing BioAI, molecular intelligence, biological foundation models, network science, complex adaptive systems, and trustworthy AI."
toc: false
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#0b2545">
---

::: {.bm-hero}
::: {.bm-hero-inner}

[UCF Interdisciplinary Research Cluster]{.bm-eyebrow}

# BioMIND

[BioAI, Molecular Intelligence, Networks, and Discovery]{.bm-subtitle}

[BioMIND is a UCF interdisciplinary research cluster advancing BioAI, molecular intelligence, biological foundation models, network science, complex adaptive systems, and trustworthy AI for biological discovery and real-world intelligent systems.]{.bm-description}

::: {.bm-hero-buttons}
[Explore Research](research/index.qmd){.bm-btn .bm-btn-primary}
[Meet the Team](people/index.qmd){.bm-btn .bm-btn-ghost}
[View Publications](publications/index.qmd){.bm-btn .bm-btn-ghost}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.bm-section}
## [Research Pillars]{.bm-section-title}

[Six interconnected research thrusts unify BioMIND's work across BioAI, molecular machine learning, complex systems, and trustworthy intelligence.]{.bm-section-subtitle}

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-3}

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🧬]{.bm-card-icon}

### BioAI & AI for Biology

Machine learning models that read, generate, and reason about the molecules of life — proteins, nucleic acids, and beyond — to accelerate biological discovery.

[Read more →](research/bioai.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[⚛️]{.bm-card-icon}

### Molecular Machine Learning & Generative Discovery

Geometric deep learning, diffusion, and equivariant architectures for molecular property prediction and de novo design across small molecules and biomolecules.

[Read more →](research/molecular-ml.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🔬]{.bm-card-icon}

### Biomolecular Foundation Models

Pretraining and adaptation of large-scale models — including mRNA, protein, and multi-modal biomolecular foundation models — for downstream scientific tasks.

[Read more →](research/foundation-models.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🌐]{.bm-card-icon}

### Network Science & Complex Adaptive Systems

Modeling collective dynamics, information flows, and emergent behavior in biological, social, and cyber-social systems.

[Read more →](research/complex-systems.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🧠]{.bm-card-icon}

### Explainable, Trustworthy & Human-Centered AI

Methods and frameworks for interpretable, fair, accountable, and human-aligned AI systems in high-stakes scientific and societal settings.

[Read more →](research/trustworthy-ai.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

::: {.bm-card .bm-pillar}
[🤖]{.bm-card-icon}

### Agentic AI for Scientific Discovery

Autonomous and collaborative agents that hypothesize, plan experiments, and iterate with humans to drive scientific workflows in biology and beyond.

[Read more →](research/agentic-ai.qmd){.bm-card-link}
:::

:::
:::

::: {.bm-section}
## [Featured Labs]{.bm-section-title}

[BioMIND brings together four UCF labs spanning BioAI, molecular ML, human-centered AI, and complex adaptive systems.]{.bm-section-subtitle}

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-2}

::: {.bm-lab-card}
### Complex Adaptive Systems Lab (CASL)
[Director — Ivan Garibay]{.bm-lab-pi}

Complex adaptive systems, network science, information dynamics, computational social science, and the science of AI in society.

[Learn more →](labs/casl.qmd)
:::

::: {.bm-lab-card}
### Human-CAIR
[Director — Ozlem Garibay]{.bm-lab-pi}

Human-centered AI, trustworthy and responsible AI, explainability, and human–AI interaction in high-stakes domains.

[Learn more →](labs/human-cair.qmd)
:::

::: {.bm-lab-card}
### MoML — Molecular Machine Learning
[Director — Ozlem Garibay]{.bm-lab-pi}

Molecular machine learning, BioAI, molecular generation, and biomolecular foundation models for discovery.

[Learn more →](labs/moml.qmd)
:::

::: {.bm-lab-card}
### AIAIR
[Director — Niloofar Yousefi]{.bm-lab-pi}

Artificial intelligence, analytics, intelligent systems, bioinformatics, and applied AI research across science and engineering.

[Learn more →](labs/aiair.qmd)
:::

:::
:::

::: {.bm-section}
## [News]{.bm-section-title}

[The latest from BioMIND.]{.bm-section-subtitle}

::: {.bm-grid .bm-grid-3}

::: {.bm-news-card}
[May 2026]{.bm-news-date}
#### BioMIND beta website launched
The BioMIND beta website is being developed to showcase UCF research at the intersection of BioAI, molecular intelligence, complex systems, and trustworthy AI.
:::

::: {.bm-news-card}
[May 2026]{.bm-news-date}
#### Name selected: BioMIND
The cluster name BioMIND reflects the group's focus on BioAI, molecular intelligence, networks, and discovery.
:::

::: {.bm-news-card}
[May 2026]{.bm-news-date}
#### Student and faculty profiles being collected
BioMIND is collecting updated bios, publication lists, profile links, and headshots from affiliated students and faculty.
:::

:::

[See all news →](news/index.qmd){.bm-btn .bm-btn-primary}
:::

::: {.bm-section}
## [Featured Publications]{.bm-section-title}

[Selected representative work across BioMIND's research thrusts. The full list lives on the [Publications](publications/index.qmd) page.]{.bm-section-subtitle}

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[Six Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence Grand Challenges.](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/10447318.2022.2153320)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Ozmen Garibay, O. *et al.*]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*International Journal of Human-Computer Interaction* · 2023]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Human-Centered AI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Responsible AI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[AttentionSiteDTI: An Interpretable Graph-Based Model for Drug-Target Interaction Prediction Using NLP Sentence-Level Relation Classification.](https://academic.oup.com/bib/article/23/4/bbac272/6640006)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Yazdani-Jahromi, M.; Yousefi, N.; Tayebi, A.; Ozmen Garibay, O.; Seal, S.; Kolanthai, E.; Neal, C. J.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Briefings in Bioinformatics* · 2022]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Molecular ML]{.bm-pub-tag} [Drug Discovery]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[BoKDiff: Best-of-K Diffusion Alignment for Target-Specific 3D Molecule Generation.](https://academic.oup.com/bioinformaticsadvances/article/5/1/vbaf137/8159881)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Khodabandeh Yalabadi, A.; Yazdani-Jahromi, M.; Ozmen Garibay, O.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Bioinformatics Advances* · 2025]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Molecular ML]{.bm-pub-tag} [Diffusion Models]{.bm-pub-tag} [Drug Discovery]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[UnbiasedDTI: Mitigating Real-World Bias of Drug-Target Interaction Prediction by Using Deep Ensemble-Balanced Learning.](https://www.mdpi.com/1420-3049/27/9/2980)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Tayebi, A.; Yousefi, N.; Yazdani-Jahromi, M.; Kolanthai, E.; Neal, C. J.; Seal, S.; Ozmen Garibay, O.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Molecules* · 2022]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[BioAI]{.bm-pub-tag} [Drug Discovery]{.bm-pub-tag} [Responsible AI]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[[Local Rademacher Complexity-Based Learning Guarantees for Multi-Task Learning.](https://jmlr.org/papers/v19/17-144.html)]{.bm-pub-title}

[Yousefi, N.; Lei, Y.; Kloft, M.; Mollaghasemi, M.; Anagnostopoulos, G.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Journal of Machine Learning Research* · 2018]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Learning Theory]{.bm-pub-tag} [Multi-Task Learning]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

::: {.bm-pub-card}
[Future Directions and Applications of Artificial Intelligence.]{.bm-pub-title}

[Garibay, I.; Barham, C.; Abdidizaji, S.; Jayalath, C.]{.bm-pub-authors}

[*Advances in Artificial Intelligence Applications* · 2025]{.bm-pub-venue}

::: {.bm-pub-tags}
[Artificial Intelligence]{.bm-pub-tag} [Complex Systems]{.bm-pub-tag}
:::
:::

[See full publication list →](publications/index.qmd){.bm-btn .bm-btn-primary}
:::

::: {.bm-cta}
## Get in touch
Interested in collaboration, seminars, student opportunities, or BioAI research partnerships? We welcome conversations with academic, industry, government, and nonprofit partners.

[Contact BioMIND](contact.qmd){.bm-btn .bm-btn-gold}
:::
